scripts.dev: infisical run --projectId 87922978-15ad-4880-add7-5ae10dbff217 --env=dev -- uv run python src/agent.py dev --no-reload
scripts.start: infisical run --projectId 87922978-15ad-4880-add7-5ae10dbff217 --env=dev -- uv run python src/agent.py start
scripts.test: uv run python -m unittest discover -s tests
scripts.doctor: infisical run --projectId 87922978-15ad-4880-add7-5ae10dbff217 --env=dev -- uv run python src/agent.py doctor
scripts.dev:lk: infisical run --projectId 87922978-15ad-4880-add7-5ae10dbff217 --env=dev -- lk agent dev src/agent.py
